attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_ASF_CA_STATUS)

attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_ASF_CA_STATUS.PROJECT_ID, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_ASF_CA_STATUS.CUST_EMAIL_ADDRESS, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_ASF_CA_STATUS.CA_REQUEST_ID, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_ASF_CA_STATUS.REQUEST_STATUS, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_ASF_CA_STATUS.REJECTION_REASON, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_ASF_CA_STATUS.ACTED_BY, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_ASF_CA_STATUS.CREATED_BY, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_ASF_CA_STATUS.CREATION_DATE, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_ASF_CA_STATUS.LAST_UPDATED_BY, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_ASF_CA_STATUS.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_ASF_CA_STATUS.LAST_UPDATED_LOGIN, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_ASF_CA_STATUS.REMINDER_SENT_FLAG, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_ASF_CA_STATUS.OGG_KEY_ID, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_ASF_CA_STATUS.TRAIL_FILE_NAME, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_ASF_CA_STATUS.SOURCE_DML_TYPE, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_ASF_CA_STATUS.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_ASF_CA_STATUS.REFRESH_DATETIME 
FROM
 $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_ASF_CA_STATUS STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_ASF_CA_STATUS,
(
select OGG_KEY_ID,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_ASF_CA_STATUS
minus
select OGG_KEY_ID,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_ASF_CA_STATUS
) ACM
where 
 ACM.OGG_KEY_ID = STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_ASF_CA_STATUS.OGG_KEY_ID and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_ASF_CA_STATUS.REFRESH_DATETIME
